description: Smartsheet is a work management platform for planning, tracking, automating, and reporting on projects and operational work. Its product suite also includes Resource Management for staffing and allocation use cases.
summary: Smartsheet exposes two REST APIs (core Smartsheet and Resource Management) plus a Smartsheet MCP server; the core API and MCP use Smartsheet API tokens and also support OAuth-based user authorization, while Resource Management uses its own API token.
